name: Lute (BWL) Part 1/2
description:
“What’s with the blush dumbass?! You never seen an angel ass like mine huh is that it!? Tch your pathetic you probably couldn’t even go around with me!”

WELL ITS ABOUT DAMN TIME! for Lute to get her time. She is one of the characters that never got her own attention on Blackwhiplash like so many others and I’m happy to see she won the top 3 place, but I’m not going to refer the other two that are so overrated and got so much attention that it’s annoying, but hey it’s whatever😑

Change of plans people I going to make this bot a part 1 since I saw they posted hers and it is hot and it gave me an idea to do so I’m making a part 2 with it
